title: Nether's Paradise (Hell's Paradise)
description: Adds Biome, Powers, Mobs, Weapons ect... from Hell's Paradise !
body:
Step into the cursed lands of Shinsenkyo, a mysterious paradise inspired by Hell’s Paradise.
What looks like heaven hides the most terrifying monsters, twisted plants, and ancient ruins.

- ⚔️ Fight for survival against floral demons and exotic beasts.

- 🌱 Explore the new biome filled with strange vegetation, poisonous plants, and hidden treasures.
- 🔪 Wield new weapons like katanas and kunai to cut through your enemies.
- 👹 Challenge powerful bosses such as the fearsome Tensen and claim rare loot.
- 🪙 Discover unique resources to craft armor, potions, and special abilities.

Will you survive the cursed paradise… or be consumed by it?
